# Standalone Product Names

## babel plugins

- [parcel](https://example.com) - Asset bundler.
- [mocha](https://example.com) - Test framework.
- [slack](https://example.com) - Team chat.
- [blender](https://example.com) - 3D suite.
- [jasmine](https://example.com) - JavaScript test framework.
- [llama](https://example.com) - Local language model runtime.
- [alpine](https://example.com) - Linux distribution.
- [rider](https://example.com) - .NET IDE.
- [eclipse](https://example.com) - Java IDE.
- [mercurial](https://example.com) - Version control system.
- [insomnia](https://example.com) - REST API client.

This uses babel
We deploy with parcel
The test suite uses mocha
Alerts arrive via slack
This was made with blender

The parcel arrived this morning
I had a mocha after lunch
Please remove the slack from the line
The blender broke yesterday
